framework.name: us_bill_of_rights
framework.description: White House OSTP Blueprint for an AI Bill of Rights — five principles for safe and effective automated systems.

controls.name: bor-safe
controls.description: Systems should be developed with consultation, tested, and monitored for safety.

controls.name: bor-discrimination
controls.description: Systems should not contribute to unjustified differential treatment.

controls.name: bor-privacy
controls.description: Built-in protections against abusive data practices and agency over data.

controls.name: bor-notice
controls.description: Notice that an automated system is being used and explanations of how it contributes to outcomes.

controls.name: bor-fallback
controls.description: Ability to opt out and access a human alternative when appropriate.
